items.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
items.summary: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.

items.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

items.title: White House gunman had previous run-ins with Secret Service, court documents show
items.summary: The suspect previously obstructed a White House entry lane in June of 2025 and told Secret Service agents he was Jesus Christ.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 李顯龍訪中霸氣表態：新加坡和中國合作並不是因為「同根同源」！
items.summary: 新加坡前總理、現任國務資政李顯龍上週結束訪中行，在中國的土地上，李顯龍霸氣表示星國與中國合作交往，單純基於共同利益，並非中共對外那套意淫意味十足的「同根同源」說。其受訪影片隨後在...…

items.title: 衛報：普廷深陷孤立仍執意攻烏 俄國菁英與民間不滿情緒升溫
items.summary: 消息人士指出，俄羅斯總統普廷（Vladimir Putin）儘管面臨經濟疲軟的困境，仍決心繼續推進烏克蘭戰爭。英國「衛報」對多名普廷親近人士、俄羅斯商界消息人士，以及西方情報...…

items.title: 習近平會見巴基斯坦總理 均提及美伊戰爭調停
items.summary: 新華社報導，中國國家主席習近平今天在北京會見巴基斯坦總理夏立夫，雙方均提及美伊戰爭調停問題。習近平說，中方讚賞巴方主動擔當，為恢復中東地區和平發揮斡旋作用；夏立夫則感謝中方支持巴方斡旋美伊談...…
